# Buy Online Pick Up In Store

Buy Online Pick Up In Store allows customers to reserve items marked as available for pickup online and collect them from a selected store, typically within two hours during opening hours. The order page indicates when items are ready for pickup, and an email notification is sent once the items are available at the counter.

[Source: store_pickup.md#buy-online-pick-up-in-store]
